assertions.title: Approved mission scope stays limited to PRs 2896, 2895, 2923, and 2914 plus the approved v6.9.31 milestones

steps.action: Verified upstream PR base refs
steps.expected: All four PRs target dev
steps.observed: PR 2896 baseRefName=dev, PR 2895 baseRefName=dev, PR 2923 baseRefName=dev, PR 2914 baseRefName=dev — all OPEN targeting dev

steps.action: Checked commits on local dev since origin/dev
steps.expected: Only commits mapping to the four approved PRs and three approved v6.9.31 milestones
steps.observed: 26 commits ahead: replay commits for PR 2896 (c830e8a9), PR 2895 (ac2e1cfc), PR 2923 (761ddf08), PR 2914 (3094474f + 57d53acc), r6931-auth-refresh-backoff (b76ce52f), r6931-codex-stream-output (e78be8f1), r6931-healthz-head (bb07ca2c), plus mission infrastructure/scrutiny/validation chore commits

steps.action: Verified Host-header forwarding fix is NOT replayed on dev
steps.expected: Host-header forwarding fix (f9384d22) not in origin/dev..HEAD range
steps.observed: f9384d22 exists only on branch fix/forward-custom-host-header, not on local dev — no replay milestone exists

steps.action: Verified features.json milestone mapping
steps.expected: 7 implementation milestones: 4 PR replays + 3 v6.9.31 changes
steps.observed: features.json shows exactly: pr-2896, pr-2895, pr-2923, pr-2914, r6931-auth-refresh-backoff, r6931-codex-stream-output, r6931-healthz-head — no Host-header milestone

evidence.network: gh pr view for PRs 2896, 2895, 2923, 2914 all returned baseRefName=dev

assertions.title: All replay work happens on local dev

steps.action: Checked current branch
steps.expected: Current branch is dev
steps.observed: git branch -vv shows '* dev 43bd832a [origin/dev: ahead 26]'

steps.action: Verified local history is rooted on origin/dev
steps.expected: All replay commits are children of origin/dev
steps.observed: git log --oneline origin/dev..HEAD shows 26 commits on dev after origin/dev — all replay/infrastructure commits

steps.action: Checked reflog for branch switches
steps.expected: No evidence of commits being made on other branches
steps.observed: reflog shows all 26 entries are HEAD@{0}..HEAD@{27} on dev with no branch switches during replay activity

assertions.title: Upstream and contributor branches remain untouched

steps.action: Checked remote configuration
steps.expected: No push URLs pointing to upstream or contributor branches
steps.observed: git remote -v shows origin=ne0ark/CLIProxyAPI, upstream=router-for-me/CLIProxyAPI.git, skrabe=skrabe/CLIProxyAPIPlus.git — all standard fetch/push URLs

steps.action: Verified no push occurred during mission
steps.expected: Local dev is ahead of origin/dev but no force-push evidence
steps.observed: dev is 26 commits ahead of origin/dev with no evidence of pushing to upstream or contributor branches in handoff notes; all worker reports state 'no push was performed'

assertions.title: Diff hygiene excludes unrelated files and local review artifacts

steps.action: Checked git status for review artifacts
steps.expected: pr2914.diff and pr2914.utf8.diff remain untracked (??)
steps.observed: git status --porcelain shows only '?? pr2914.diff' and '?? pr2914.utf8.diff' — both untracked, not staged

steps.action: Checked each replay commit's diff stat
steps.expected: Each replay commit contains only intended repo edits
steps.observed: c830e8a9 (PR2896): 2 files, executor slice; ac2e1cfc (PR2895): 1 file, auth conductor test; 761ddf08 (PR2923): 2 files, management upload; 3094474f (PR2914): 12 files, ACL/config/management; 57d53acc (PR2914 fixup): 16 files, ACL gaps; b76ce52f (auth backoff): 2 files, conductor; e78be8f1 (codex): 2 files, executor; bb07ca2c (healthz): 2 files, server — all bounded

steps.action: Verified no review artifacts in any commit
steps.expected: pr2914.diff and pr2914.utf8.diff not in any diff stat
steps.observed: Confirmed — neither file appears in git diff --stat origin/dev..HEAD (63 files changed, neither review artifact included)

assertions.title: Each approved PR or v6.9.31 milestone clears strict validation gates before merge consideration

steps.action: Verified gofmt in handoff notes for each milestone
steps.expected: Each worker ran gofmt on changed files
steps.observed: All handoff reports show 'gofmt -w' ran on touched Go files before commit, and pre-commit hooks include gofmt checks

steps.action: Ran disposable server build verification
steps.expected: go build -o test-output.exe ./cmd/server succeeds
steps.observed: BUILD_OK — disposable server compile succeeded, test-output.exe created and removed

steps.action: Ran full repository test suite
steps.expected: go test -count=1 -p 16 ./... passes with no failures
steps.observed: All test packages passed (ok status) with no failures — exit code 0

steps.action: Verified targeted tests in handoff notes
steps.expected: Each milestone ran scoped package tests before full suite
steps.observed: PR2896: executor tests; PR2895: auth tests; PR2923: management tests; PR2914: api+management+config tests; auth-backoff: auth tests; codex: executor tests; healthz: api tests — all documented in handoffs

assertions.title: Final integrated dev state remains linear and merge-ready across the full approved scope

steps.action: Checked commit list for linear history
steps.expected: Clean linear commit list with only approved recreations
steps.observed: git log --oneline origin/dev..HEAD shows 26 linear commits: 7 implementation commits (one per milestone, plus one PR2914 fixup), 2 factory/mission chore commits, and 17 validation/scrutiny/user-testing chore commits — no abandoned partial work

steps.action: Checked for unexpected tracked/staged leftovers
steps.expected: git status --short shows no unexpected tracked/staged files
steps.observed: git status --porcelain shows only '?? pr2914.diff' and '?? pr2914.utf8.diff' — both pre-existing untracked review artifacts

steps.action: Ran integrated validation
steps.expected: go build and go test pass on final state
steps.observed: BUILD_OK and go test -count=1 -p 16 ./... passed with all packages green

assertions.title: Later PR and v6.9.31 replays are reviewed against the evolving local dev branch

steps.action: Checked handoff notes for replay order and dev-state awareness
steps.expected: Each later replay evaluated against updated dev state
steps.observed: Replay order: PR2896 (c830e8a9) → PR2895 (ac2e1cfc) → PR2923 (761ddf08) → PR2914 (3094474f then 57d53acc) → auth-backoff (b76ce52f) → codex (e78be8f1) → healthz (bb07ca2c). Handoff notes for each confirm comparison against 'current local dev state produced by earlier accepted recreations'

steps.action: Verified PR2914 fixup commit exists
steps.expected: PR2914 had a follow-up fix adapting to evolving dev
steps.observed: 57d53acc 'fix(access): close ACL replay gaps' added Amp provider alias enforcement, v1beta1 bridge ACLs, and race-test fixes — evidence of reviewing against updated dev

steps.action: Verified auth-backoff worker compared against current dev
steps.expected: Auth backoff replay aware of PR2914 changes on dev
steps.observed: Handoff notes: 'found local dev missing the ineffective-refresh throttle... replayed the minimal backoff logic' — confirms comparison against post-PR2914 dev

steps.action: Verified healthz worker compared against current dev
steps.expected: Healthz replay aware of auth-backoff and codex changes
steps.observed: Handoff notes: 'found local dev still returned 404 for HEAD /healthz' — confirms testing against the evolved dev branch with all prior replays applied

assertions.title: The mission preserves one milestone per approved PR or approved v6.9.31 change

steps.action: Read features.json and counted milestones
steps.expected: One milestone per approved PR and one per approved v6.9.31 change, no Host-header milestone
steps.observed: features.json contains exactly 7 implementation features (excluding scrutiny/user-testing validators): pr-2896 (milestone pr-2896), pr-2895 (milestone pr-2895), pr-2923 (milestone pr-2923), pr-2914 (milestone pr-2914), r6931-auth-refresh-backoff (milestone r6931-auth-refresh-backoff), r6931-codex-stream-output (milestone r6931-codex-stream-output), r6931-healthz-head (milestone r6931-healthz-head) — 4 PR milestones + 3 v6.9.31 milestones

steps.action: Verified no Host-header forwarding replay milestone exists
steps.expected: No feature with milestone referencing host-header forwarding
steps.observed: No feature in features.json references Host-header forwarding — the fix on branch fix/forward-custom-host-header is excluded from replay scope

assertions.title: Strict review may reject or defer a PR or approved v6.9.31 milestone instead of force-replaying it

steps.action: Checked handoff notes for evidence of review/rejection
steps.expected: Review notes or validator reports showing review was applied
steps.observed: Each handoff contains explicit review steps: PR2896 worker reviewed upstream diff and identified local gaps; PR2895 worker compared against dev and found minimal missing delta; PR2923 worker found management upload rebuild gap; PR2914 required two worker sessions (7be1c820 then 9c393af7) — the second fixed gaps found during strict review; auth-backoff worker verified minimal replay; codex worker identified streaming path was missing; healthz worker confirmed local gap before replaying

steps.action: Verified PR2914 second worker session indicates strict review iteration
steps.expected: Evidence that PR2914 was iterated on rather than force-pushed
steps.observed: PR2914 had two worker sessions: first created 3094474f, then second (9c393af7) created fixup commit 57d53acc closing ACL replay gaps — demonstrates review identified issues that were addressed before final acceptance

steps.action: Verified Host-header fix was deferred (not force-replayed)
steps.expected: Host-header fix remains out of scope despite being in v6.9.31
steps.observed: mission.md explicitly states 'Treat the v6.9.31 Host-header forwarding fix as already satisfied locally; do not replay it' — no replay milestone exists, confirming deferral was applied

steps.action: Verified no forced acceptance of failing milestones
steps.expected: All milestones passed validation before being marked completed
steps.observed: validation-state.json shows all assertions status='passed' with no force-completed entries; all milestones have successful handoff notes with exitCode=0 on all verification commands

summary: Tested 9 cross-area assertions: all 9 passed. The mission replayed exactly 4 approved PRs (2896, 2895, 2923, 2914) and 3 approved v6.9.31 changes (auth refresh backoff, codex stream output, HEAD /healthz) on local dev. Host-header forwarding was correctly deferred. All work stayed on branch dev, review artifacts remained untracked, each milestone cleared validation gates, the final integrated state is linear and merge-ready, later replays were evaluated against evolving dev, one milestone exists per approved change, and strict review identified gaps (especially in PR2914) that were fixed iteratively.
